hooks.command: echo 'Remember: remove unused imports and run typecheck before committing TS files'

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.test\.ts\|\.spec\.ts'; then echo 'TEST QUALITY CHECK (prompt-style): Verify this test file has NO theatrical anti-patterns: .catch(() => false), || true, toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0), conditional expects without else. Each expect() must be able to FAIL.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'POST-COMMIT: verify lint-staged stash list and check for orphan stashes'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm run build'; then echo 'POST-BUILD: Check exit code. If prerender errors, check for missing force-dynamic or env var issues.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm test\|npx vitest\|npx playwright'; then echo 'POST-TEST: Review failures before proceeding. Do not skip failing tests.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then COMMIT_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|test|chore|ci|perf|style|build)'; then echo 'COMMIT-QUALITY: OK — conventional commit format detected'; else echo 'COMMIT-QUALITY WARNING: Message does not follow conventional commits (feat:|fix:|refactor:|docs:|test:|chore:). Consider amending.'; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'tsc --noEmit\|typecheck'; then echo 'TS-SEVERITY: Review errors by severity — CRITICAL (type mismatches, missing properties) vs WARN (unused vars) vs INFO (style). Fix CRITICAL first.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then REPO=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*github.com[:/]//;s/.git$//'); BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); COMMITS=$(git log origin/$BRANCH..$BRANCH --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); curl -s -X POST 'https://n8n.raizeducacao.com.br/webhook/git-audit' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"repo\":\"$REPO\",\"branch\":\"$BRANCH\",\"commits\":$COMMITS,\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo 'GIT-AUDIT: Push event sent to n8n webhook.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm test\|npx vitest\|npx playwright'; then curl -s -X POST 'https://n8n.raizeducacao.com.br/webhook/test-metrics' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"suite\":\"$(basename $(pwd))\",\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo 'TEST-METRICS: Test run event sent to n8n webhook.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm run build'; then if [ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_EXIT_CODE" != "0" ] 2>/dev/null; then curl -s -X POST 'https://n8n.raizeducacao.com.br/webhook/build-alert' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"project\":\"$(basename $(pwd))\",\"branch\":\"$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null)\",\"timestamp\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"status\":\"FAILED\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo 'BUILD-ALERT: Build failure sent to n8n webhook.'; fi; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'vercel --prod'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use CI/CD pipeline (gh pr create + merge) instead of direct vercel --prod'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push.*--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is dangerous. Use git push without --force, or discuss with user first.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify bypasses safety hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git stash'; then echo 'WARNING: git stash can cause issues with lint-staged. Consider git commit (WIP) instead.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'supabase db push'; then echo 'WARNING: supabase db push applies migrations to remote DB. Verify target environment first.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm run build'; then echo 'PRE-BUILD SAFETY (agent-style): Before building, verify: 1) No unused imports in modified files 2) force-dynamic present in root layout 3) .env vars not corrupted. Run typecheck first if not done.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh pr create|vercel deploy'; then BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo 'DEPLOY PREFLIGHT BLOCKED: Cannot deploy from main/master directly. Create a feature branch first.'; exit 2; fi; echo 'DEPLOY PREFLIGHT (agent-style): Verify before proceeding: 1) Build passes locally 2) Typecheck clean 3) Tests pass 4) Env vars correct 5) Branch is not main'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'supabase migration|supabase db push'; then echo 'MIGRATION SAFETY (agent-style): Verify: 1) RLS policy included in migration 2) Rollback SQL exists 3) Migration naming follows YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_desc.sql 4) No destructive operations without backup'; fi

INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for f in .env .mcp.json package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json playwright.config.ts; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$f"; then echo "WARNING: Writing to config file $f. Use Edit tool for surgical changes instead of Write to avoid overwriting existing config."; break; fi; done
